repo.description: Get started with building Fullstack Agents using Gemini 2.5 and LangGraph

terms.context_snippet: This project demonstrates a fullstack application using a React frontend and a LangGraph-powered backend agent. The agent is designed to perform comprehensive research on a user's query by dynamically generating search terms, querying the web using Google Search, reflecting on t…
